author: doll-agent
content:
Done. power_to_chebyshev and power_to_legendre maintained an x_pow_prev variable assigned each iteration but never read. The recurrences only consume x_pow (current) -> x_pow_next, so the prev state was dead. The trailing 'let _ = x_pow_prev;' was a band-aid suppressing the unused-assignment warning rather than fixing the root cause.

Dropped the variable in both files: the initial x_pow.clone(), the per-iteration assignment, and the trailing let _ line.

ferray-polynomial: 134 tests pass, clippy clean. Commit 68e618a5.
